Meaning.Vi: Cái phích cắm; cái nút; cái bịt; cái bịt kín
Meaning.En: A short, solid or hollow cylinder, typically made of rubber, plastic, or metal, used to block a hole or fit into a socket to complete an electrical circuit.
Meaning.Example: He inserted the plug into the wall socket to charge his phone.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả hành động cắm thiết bị điện vào ổ cắm.
Situation.En: Describes the action of connecting an electrical device to a wall outlet.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc bịt kín một lỗ rò rỉ bằng nút.
Situation.En: Describes sealing a leak or hole using a physical plug.

Meaning.En: To insert a plug into a socket; to block or fill a hole completely; to fill or crowd something densely.
Meaning.Example: She plugged the drain before filling the bathtub.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả hành động cắm phích vào ổ điện.
Situation.En: Describes inserting an electrical plug into a socket.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc bịt kín một lỗ bằng vật liệu phù hợp.
Situation.En: Describes sealing a hole (e.g., in a pipe or container) with a plug.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc lấp đầy không gian chật chội.
Situation.En: Describes filling a space so densely that little room remains (e.g., a crowded room).

Meaning.Vi: Đẩy mạnh; ném mạnh; nhét vội
Meaning.En: To push or thrust something forcefully into a space or position.
Meaning.Example: He plugged his hands into his pockets and walked away quickly.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả hành động nhét vội tay vào túi.
Situation.En: Describes shoving one’s hands quickly into pockets, often for warmth or concealment.
